backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Board Saathi app defining all data types (UserProfile, Chapter, MockTest, Flashcard, etc.) and persistent state maps per principal, with authorization mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented feature IDs to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for the Board Saathi app's dashboard and timer features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable fixes for every page and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Board Saathi PWA, including viewport meta tags, PWA manifest link, iOS/Safari PWA tags, favicon links, and SEO/Open Graph metadata.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Board Saathi specifying app name, theme colors, display mode, orientation, icon sizes, and categories.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with precaching of app shell assets, old cache cleanup on activation, and network fallback with background cache refresh for HTML requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the full client-side router using TanStack Router with auth-guarded routes for students and parents, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and registers all page-level route components.
frontend/src/components/AIAssistant.tsx: Floating chat widget ('Saathi') that answers user questions about the app by matching input against a local FAQ matcher, rendering responses with basic bold markdown support.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavBar.tsx: Fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with five primary links (Home, Subject, Question, Reminder, Target) that highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/DailyView.tsx: Displays and manages planner tasks for a specific date, supporting adding (with title, description, and start time), toggling completion, and deleting tasks via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main authenticated shell with a fixed desktop sidebar and mobile-friendly navigation, handling logout, unread message badge, and rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/NotesSection.tsx: Per-chapter notes panel that lets students add text and image-attached notes, view them in collapsible cards, and delete them using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Fixed bottom banner that prompts users to install the app to their home screen using the PWA install hook, with dismiss and install action buttons.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsSection: React component that displays, adds, and deletes Q&A pairs for a given chapter, with collapsible answer reveal and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/QuoteOfTheDayCar: Displays a daily motivational quote in a gradient card using a utility function to select the quote.
frontend/src/components/StreakCard.tsx: Shows the user's current and top study streak with a gradient header and earned milestone badges (3, 7, 30 days).
frontend/src/components/TargetMotivation: Displays a circular SVG progress indicator and motivational message based on the percentage of completed targets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions and status flags backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Hook that captures the browser's beforeinstallprompt event and exposes install/dismiss logic with persistent dismissal state in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central data-access layer that wraps all localStorage CRUD operations (subjects, chapters, notes, questions, flashcards, tests, planner, etc.) as React Query hooks and re-exports their TypeScript types.
frontend/src/hooks/useReminderAlarm.ts: Provides a React hook for playing, previewing, and stopping alarm sounds using the Web Audio API, with a predefined map of available alarm sounds.
React hook that schedules browser notifications (5 minutes before) and alarm sounds (at exact time) for a list of local reminders using setTimeout, with cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useTargetAlarmSchedul: React hook that schedules a 1-hour-before alarm sound and browser notification for incomplete targets with deadlines, clearing timeouts on unmount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties using an oklch color palette (teal and orange) along with utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static informational page that displays feature descriptions and usage tips for all major app sections (Subjects, Flashcards, Mock Tests, Planner, Targets, Reminders, etc.) using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/AttemptMockTestPage.t: Page component for taking a mock test, displaying one question at a time with an elapsed timer, answer selection, progress tracking, and submission that navigates to a report page.
frontend/src/pages/ChaptersPage.tsx: Page that lists chapters for a given subject, allowing users to add chapters, toggle completion status, and expand each chapter to view its notes and questions via tabs.
frontend/src/pages/CreateMockTestPage.ts: A form page for creating a new mock test, allowing users to set a test name, select a subject, and add/remove MCQ questions with options and correct answers before submitting.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: The main dashboard page displaying a days-left-in-month banner, study streak, chapter progress, active targets, upcoming reminders, and unread messages summary for the logged-in user.
frontend/src/pages/FlashcardsPage.tsx: A flashcard management page where users can add, flip, shuffle, mark as learned, and delete flashcards filtered by subject.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles student login, registration, forgot-password flow, and parent login/registration via dialogs, storing session data in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/MockTestsPage.tsx: Lists all created mock tests with subject, question count, attempt count, and best score, and provides actions to start, view reports, or delete each test.
frontend/src/pages/MyAchievementsPage.ts: Displays a user's achievements page including stat cards (chapters completed, questions practiced, streak, fastest test), earned badges, and current rank, fetched via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ParentDashboard.tsx: Renders a parent-facing dashboard that reads a child's study data from localStorage (subjects, chapters, test attempts, flashcards, notes) and allows parents to send messages and view teacher replies.
frontend/src/pages/PlannerPage.tsx: Implements a monthly calendar planner view where users can navigate months, see per-day task counts, and open a daily detail dialog via the DailyView component.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Provides a profile settings page where authenticated users can update their name, school, and class, change their password, log out, or trigger a PWA service worker update.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Shows a progress tracker with overview stats (tasks, targets, average mock test score), per-subject chapter completion progress bars, and a list of recent test attempts.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionBankPage.tsx: Displays a filterable question bank page where users can select a subject and chapter to browse questions, with each question card supporting a toggle to show/hide the answer.
frontend/src/pages/RemindersPage.tsx: Provides a reminders management page allowing users to add reminders with a date, time, and alarm sound (with preview), and delete existing ones, with scheduled notifications via useReminderScheduler.
frontend/src/pages/RevisionPage.tsx: Shows pending and completed spaced-repetition revision tasks sorted by due date, allowing users to mark tasks complete with visual due-date status indicators.
frontend/src/pages/StudentMessagesPage.t: Renders a student inbox for messages sent by parents, supporting expand/collapse, mark-as-read, and reply functionality that saves replies back to the parent's inbox via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Lists all subjects in a grid with chapter completion progress bars, and provides a dialog to add new subjects, navigating to a subject detail page on click.
frontend/src/pages/TargetsPage.tsx: Displays a page for managing study targets with add, complete, and delete functionality, including deadline formatting and a 1-hour-before alarm scheduler via useTargetAlarmScheduler.
frontend/src/pages/TestReportPage.tsx: Shows a detailed report for the latest mock test attempt, including score, percentage, time taken, progress bar, per-question breakdown, and a summary of all previous attempts.
frontend/src/pages/TimerPage.tsx: Provides a countdown timer page where users can create named timers with start/end dates, displaying live month/day/hour/minute/second countdowns stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/faqMatcher.ts: Defines a keyword-based FAQ database covering app features (planner, subjects, notes, mock tests, etc.) used to match user queries to predefined help responses.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageService.t: Provides a comprehensive offline data service managing user accounts, session state, password hashing, and namespaced per-user data storage using localStorage and sessionStorage.
frontend/src/utils/quotesData.ts: Contains an array of motivational quotes and a getQuoteOfTheDay function that deterministically selects a quote based on the day of the year.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Nunito, Poppins), an extended color palette using OKLCH variables, border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) describing a student productivity app's existing features, architectural notes (persistent bottom nav), known build issues, and feature metadata keyed by requirement IDs.
